pi_items.source: setup_task.sh calls veracrypt --create on this exact path.
setup_task.sh redirects shuf output to this exact path.
setup_task.sh creates this directory and export_result.sh checks this path for output.
setup_task.sh generates a text file named Project_Alpha_Summary.pdf with synthetic content and copies it into the volume.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated data. During setup, an encrypted VeraCrypt volume is created at '/home/ga/Volumes/project_alpha_archive.hc' and populated with a synthetic text file disguised as 'Project_Alpha_Summary.pdf'. A randomized list of passwords is created at '/home/ga/Documents/potential_passwords.txt'. The export scripts verify the recovered file in '/home/ga/Documents/Recovered'.
